case_title: XIAO XIA LIN VS. A HAPPY FOR WOMEN LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAO XIA AS TO DEFENDANT A HAPPY FOR WOMEN LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA JIN HEALING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, XIAO XIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A HAPPY FOR WOMEN LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA JIN HEALING $12,406.97 PRINCIPAL, $47.84 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,824.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
